141	async def _is_safe_preview_url(url: str) -> bool:
142	    parsed = urlparse(url)
143	    if parsed.scheme not in ("http", "https"):
144	        return False
145	    hostname = parsed.hostname
146	    if not hostname:
147	        return False
148	    if (
149	        hostname in ("localhost",)
150	        or hostname.endswith(".local")
151	        or hostname.endswith(".internal")
152	    ):
153	        return False
154	    try:
155	        infos = await asyncio.to_thread(socket.getaddrinfo, hostname, None)
156	        for family, _, _, _, sockaddr in infos:
157	            addr = ipaddress.ip_address(sockaddr[0])
158	            if (
159	                addr.is_private
160	                or addr.is_loopback
161	                or addr.is_link_local
162	                or addr.is_reserved
163	            ):
164	                return False
165	    except (socket.gaierror, ValueError):
166	        return False
167	    return True

187	async def _fetch_oembed_preview(client, url: str, oembed_base: str) -> dict | None:
188	    from urllib.parse import quote
189	
190	    resp = await asyncio.wait_for(
191	        client.get(oembed_base + quote(url, safe=""), follow_redirects=True),
192	        timeout=3.0,
193	    )
194	    if resp.status_code != 200:
195	        return None
196	    data = resp.json()
197	    title = data.get("title", "")
198	    if not title:
199	        return None
200	    image = data.get("thumbnail_url", "")
201	    if image and "ytimg.com" in image:
202	        image = re.sub(r"/[a-z]*default\.jpg", "/hq720.jpg", image)
203	    return {
204	        "url": url,
205	        "title": title[:200],
206	        "description": data.get("author_name", ""),
207	        "image": image,
208	        "domain": data.get("provider_name", urlparse(url).netloc),
209	    }

212	async def _fetch_og_preview(client, url: str) -> dict | None:
213	    _og_headers = {
214	        "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; StoneCompanionBot/1.0)",
215	        "Accept": "text/html",
216	    }
217	    resp = await asyncio.wait_for(
218	        client.get(url, headers=_og_headers, follow_redirects=False),
219	        timeout=3.0,
220	    )
221	    if resp.is_redirect:
222	        location = resp.headers.get("location", "")
223	        if not location or not await _is_safe_preview_url(location):
224	            return None
225	        resp = await asyncio.wait_for(
226	            client.get(location, headers=_og_headers, follow_redirects=False),
227	            timeout=3.0,
228	        )
229	    if resp.status_code != 200:
230	        return None
231	    cl = resp.headers.get("content-length")
232	    if cl and cl.isdigit() and int(cl) > 1_000_000:
233	        return None
234	    ct = resp.headers.get("content-type", "")
235	    if "text/html" not in ct and "application/xhtml" not in ct:
236	        return None
237	    body = resp.text
238	    head_end = body.find("</head>")
239	    if head_end > 0:
240	        body = body[:head_end]
241	    else:
242	        body = body[:100000]
243	    og = {}
244	    for m in _OG_RE.finditer(body):
245	        og.setdefault(m.group(1).lower(), m.group(2))
246	    for m in _OG_RE2.finditer(body):
247	        og.setdefault(m.group(2).lower(), m.group(1))
248	    title = og.get("title", "")
249	    if not title:
250	        tm = _TITLE_RE.search(body)
251	        title = tm.group(1).strip() if tm else ""
252	    if not title:
253	        return None
254	    description = og.get("description", "")
255	    if not description:
256	        dm = _DESC_RE.search(body)
257	        description = dm.group(1).strip() if dm else ""
258	    image = og.get("image", "")
259	    if image and image.startswith("/"):
260	        parsed = urlparse(url)
261	        image = f"{parsed.scheme}://{parsed.netloc}{image}"
262	    domain = og.get("site_name", "") or urlparse(url).netloc
263	    return {
264	        "url": url,
265	        "title": title[:200],
266	        "description": description[:300],
267	        "image": image,
268	        "domain": domain,
269	    }

309	async def _push_or_defer(
310	    user_id: str,
311	    room_id: str,
312	    room_type: str,
313	    room_name: str,
314	    sender_name: str,
315	    text_preview: str,
316	    msg_id: str | None = None,
317	) -> None:
318	    global _push_counter
319	    key = f"{user_id}:{room_id}"
320	    now = time.monotonic()
321	    last = _push_debounce.get(key, 0)
322	    if now - last > 1800:
323	        _push_sent.pop(key, None)
324	    window = 60 if _push_sent.get(key) else 10
325	    if now - last < window:
326	        if key not in _push_flush_tasks:
327	            delay = last + window - now
328	            _push_flush_tasks[key] = asyncio.create_task(
329	                _flush_push_later(key, delay, user_id, room_id, room_type, room_name)
330	            )
331	        return
332	    _push_debounce[key] = now
333	    silent = bool(_push_sent.get(key))
334	    _push_sent[key] = True
335	    _push_counter += 1
336	    await _do_send_push(
337	        user_id,
338	        room_id,
339	        room_type,
340	        room_name,
341	        sender_name,
342	        text_preview,
343	        msg_id,
344	        silent=silent,
345	        push_index=_push_counter,
346	    )

362	async def _do_send_push(
363	    user_id: str,
364	    room_id: str,
365	    room_type: str,
366	    room_name: str,
367	    sender_name: str,
368	    text_preview: str,
369	    msg_id: str | None,
370	    silent: bool,
371	    push_index: int,
372	) -> None:
373	    db = get_chat_db()
374	    try:
375	        subs = get_push_subscriptions(db, user_id)
376	        if not subs:
377	            return
378	        counts = get_unread_counts(db, user_id)
379	        room_counts = counts.get(room_id)
380	        count = room_counts["count"] if room_counts else 0
381	        total_unread = sum(c["count"] for c in counts.values())
382	        if count == 0:
383	            return
384	        last_read = room_counts["last_read_at"] if room_counts else "1970-01-01"
385	        now_iso = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
386	        row = db.execute(
387	            "SELECT id FROM messages WHERE room_id = ? AND created_at > ? "
388	            "AND user_id != ? AND expires_at > ? ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1",
389	            (room_id, last_read, user_id, now_iso),
390	        ).fetchone()
391	        first_msg_id = row["id"] if row else msg_id
392	        if not sender_name:
393	            msg_row = db.execute(
394	                "SELECT m.content, u.display_name, u.username FROM messages m "
395	                "JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id "
396	                "WHERE m.room_id = ? AND m.created_at > ? AND m.user_id != ? AND m.expires_at > ? "
397	                "ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1",
398	                (room_id, last_read, user_id, now_iso),
399	            ).fetchone()
400	            if msg_row:
401	                sender_name = msg_row["display_name"] or msg_row["username"]
402	                if count == 1:
403	                    if room_type == "dm":
404	                        _, text_preview = _dm_preview(sender_name)
405	                    else:
406	                        text_preview = msg_row["content"] or ""
407	    finally:
408	        db.close()
409	
410	    vapid_private_key = os.environ.get("VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY")
411	    if not vapid_private_key:
412	        return
413	    if "BEGIN" not in vapid_private_key and not os.path.isfile(vapid_private_key):
414	        logger.warning("VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY file not found: %s", vapid_private_key)
415	        return
416	
417	    if count == 1:
418	        if room_type == "dm":
419	            title = sender_name
420	            body = text_preview[:100]
421	        elif room_type == "meetup":
422	            title = room_name
423	            body = f"{sender_name}: {text_preview[:80]}"
424	        else:
425	            title = f"#{room_name}"
426	            body = f"{sender_name}: {text_preview[:80]}"
427	    else:
428	        if room_type == "dm":
429	            title = sender_name
430	        elif room_type == "meetup":
431	            title = room_name
432	        else:
433	            title = f"#{room_name}"
434	        body = f"{count} new messages"
435	
436	    url = f"/chat/msg/{first_msg_id}" if first_msg_id else f"/chat/r/{room_id}"
437	    payload = json.dumps(
438	        {
439	            "title": title,
440	            "body": body,
441	            "room_id": room_id,
442	            "room_type": room_type,
443	            "count": count,
444	            "total_unread": total_unread,
445	            "url": url,
446	            "silent": silent,
447	            "push_index": push_index,
448	            # push_index resets to 0 on every server restart, so it alone can
449	            # collide with a still-visible notification's tag and cause iOS to
450	            # silently drop notificationclick on the replaced notification.
451	            "push_id": secrets.token_hex(8),
452	        }
453	    )
454	
455	    vapid_claims = {
456	        "sub": os.environ.get("VAPID_CLAIMS_EMAIL", "mailto:noreply@example.com")
457	    }
458	    try:
459	        from pywebpush import webpush, WebPushException
460	    except ImportError:
461	        logger.warning("pywebpush not installed, skipping chat push")
462	        return
463	    for sub in subs:
464	        try:
465	            await asyncio.to_thread(
466	                webpush,
467	                subscription_info={
468	                    "endpoint": sub["endpoint"],
469	                    "keys": {"p256dh": sub["p256dh"], "auth": sub["auth"]},
470	                },
471	                data=payload,
472	                vapid_private_key=vapid_private_key,
473	                # Fresh copy per endpoint: pywebpush mutates the claims dict,
474	                # stamping the FIRST endpoint's origin as `aud` -- a shared
475	                # dict poisons every later push to a different push service
476	                # (FCM rejects an apple aud with 403; mixed-service users
477	                # only ever reached the first service).
478	                vapid_claims=dict(vapid_claims),
479	            )
480	        except WebPushException as e:
481	            if (
482	                hasattr(e, "response")
483	                and e.response is not None
484	                and e.response.status_code in (404, 410)
485	            ):
486	                cleanup_db = get_chat_db()
487	                delete_push_subscription_by_endpoint(cleanup_db, sub["endpoint"])
488	                cleanup_db.close()
489	            else:
490	                logger.warning("Chat push failed for %s: %s", sub["endpoint"][:60], e)
491	        except Exception:
492	            logger.exception("Unexpected push error")

495	class ChatRoom:
496	    def __init__(self):
497	        self.connections: dict[str, WebSocket] = {}
498	        self.conn_users: dict[str, str] = {}
499	        self.user_names: dict[str, str] = {}
500	        self.user_info: dict[str, dict] = {}
501	
502	    async def broadcast(self, event: dict, exclude_conn: str | None = None) -> None:
503	        payload = json.dumps(event)
504	        disconnected = []
505	        for conn_id, ws in list(self.connections.items()):
506	            if conn_id == exclude_conn:
507	                continue
508	            try:
509	                await ws.send_text(payload)
510	            except Exception:
511	                disconnected.append(conn_id)
512	        for cid in disconnected:
513	            uid = self.conn_users.pop(cid, None)
514	            self.connections.pop(cid, None)
515	            if uid and not any(u == uid for u in self.conn_users.values()):
516	                self.user_names.pop(uid, None)
517	                self.user_info.pop(uid, None)

520	class ConnectionManager:
521	    def __init__(self):
522	        self.rooms: dict[str, ChatRoom] = {}
523	        self.user_conns: dict[str, dict[str, WebSocket]] = {}
524	        self.conn_user: dict[str, str] = {}
525	        self.user_rooms: dict[str, set[str]] = {}
526	        self._rate_buckets: dict[str, list[float]] = {}
527	        self.user_badge_rooms: dict[str, set[str]] = {}
528	        self.user_unread: dict[str, dict[str, int]] = {}
529	        self._room_meta: dict[str, dict] = {}
530	        self._recent_msgs: dict[str, list] = {}
531	        self._last_active_ts: dict[str, float] = {}
532	        self._last_ws_activity: dict[str, float] = {}
533	
534	    def should_update_last_active(self, user_id: str, interval: float = 60.0) -> bool:
535	        now = time.monotonic()
536	        last = self._last_active_ts.get(user_id, 0)
537	        if now - last >= interval:
538	            self._last_active_ts[user_id] = now
539	            return True
540	        return False
541	
542	    def _get_room(self, room_id: str) -> ChatRoom:
543	        if room_id not in self.rooms:
544	            self.rooms[room_id] = ChatRoom()
545	        return self.rooms[room_id]
546	
547	    async def connect(self, ws: WebSocket, user_id: str, conn_id: str) -> None:
548	        self.user_conns.setdefault(user_id, {})[conn_id] = ws
549	        self.conn_user[conn_id] = user_id
550	        self.user_rooms.setdefault(user_id, set())
551	        self._last_ws_activity[user_id] = time.monotonic()
552	
553	    def disconnect(self, conn_id: str) -> tuple[str | None, set[str]]:
554	        user_id = self.conn_user.pop(conn_id, None)
555	        if not user_id:
556	            return None, set()
557	        conns = self.user_conns.get(user_id, {})
558	        conns.pop(conn_id, None)
559	        for room_id in list(self.user_rooms.get(user_id, set())):
560	            room = self.rooms.get(room_id)
561	            if room:
562	                room.connections.pop(conn_id, None)
563	                room.conn_users.pop(conn_id, None)
564	        if not conns:
565	            self.user_conns.pop(user_id, None)
566	            rooms = self.user_rooms.pop(user_id, set())
567	            self.user_badge_rooms.pop(user_id, None)
568	            self.user_unread.pop(user_id, None)
569	            self._rate_buckets.pop(user_id, None)
570	            self._recent_msgs.pop(user_id, None)
571	            self._last_active_ts.pop(user_id, None)
572	            for room_id in rooms:
573	                room = self.rooms.get(room_id)
574	                if room and not any(u == user_id for u in room.conn_users.values()):
575	                    room.user_names.pop(user_id, None)
576	                    room.user_info.pop(user_id, None)
577	            return user_id, rooms
578	        return user_id, set()

681	    def check_rate_limit(
682	        self, user_id: str, max_msgs: int = 10, window_secs: int = 10
683	    ) -> bool:
684	        now = time.monotonic()
685	        bucket = self._rate_buckets.setdefault(user_id, [])
686	        bucket[:] = [t for t in bucket if now - t < window_secs]
687	        if len(bucket) >= max_msgs:
688	            return False
689	        bucket.append(now)
690	        return True

692	    def check_duplicate(self, user_id: str, text: str, window_secs: int = 120) -> bool:
693	        if len(text) <= 4:
694	            return False
695	        now = time.monotonic()
696	        history = self._recent_msgs.get(user_id, [])
697	        history[:] = [(t, msg) for t, msg in history if now - t < window_secs]
698	        normalized = text.strip().lower()
699	        is_dup = any(msg == normalized for _, msg in history[-3:])
700	        history.append((now, normalized))
701	        self._recent_msgs[user_id] = history
702	        return is_dup
